## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeProducedFilling.restoreFromHistory() method

Factory method for restoring a RuntimeProducedFilling from serialized history. Restores the complete editing state including undo/redo stacks.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static restoreFromHistory(history: ISerializedEditingHistory<IProducedFilling>): Result<RuntimeProducedFilling>;
```
